1: And And loving favour rather than silver and gold.
2: The LORD LORD is is the maker of them all.
3: But the simple pass on, and are punished.
4: Are Are riches, and honour, and life.
5: He that doth keep his soul shall be far from them.
6: And when he is old, he will not depart from it.
7: And the borrower is is servant to the lender.
8: And the rod of his anger shall fail.
9: For he giveth of his bread to the poor.
10: Yea, strife and reproach shall cease.
11: For For the grace of his lips the king shall be shall be his friend.
12: And he overthroweth the words of the transgressor.
13: I shall be slain in the streets.
14: He that is abhorred of the LORD LORD shall fall therein.
15: But But the rod of correction shall drive it far from him.
16: And And he that giveth to the rich, shall shall surely come come to want.
17: And apply thine heart unto my knowledge.
18: They shall withal be fitted in thy lips.
19: I have made known to thee this day, even to thee.
21: That thou mightest answer the words of truth to them that send unto thee?
22: Neither oppress the afflicted in the gate:
23: And spoil the soul of those that spoiled them.
24: And with a furious man thou shalt not go:
25: And get a snare to thy soul.
26: Or Or of them that are sureties for debts.
27: Why should he take away thy bed from under thee?
29: He shall not stand before mean men men .
